response.justification: Solid full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience and a recent touchpoint on AI-agent infrastructure, but the resume does not show the director-level technical leadership, recognized AI expertise, or cloud/AI platform strategy work the role requires. Tenure is around 14-16 years of professional engineering but at senior/staff IC scope, not principal/director influence across organizations.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Active community contributor with talks, workshops, and open-source projects
concerns: No demonstrated recognized AI expertise or AI products/platforms shipped
Lacks principal/director-level strategic leadership and customer advisory experience
Limited depth in cloud platform strategy beyond AWS CDK usage

key_factors.factor: AI expertise and platform track record
